# Anderson Island Healthcare Advocates (AIHA)

> Public information about Anderson Island Healthcare Advocates (AIHA) — a Washington nonprofit facilitating health care delivery on Anderson Island.

- Site: https://www.andersonislandhealth.org/
- General inquiries: info@andersonislandhealth.org
- Fundraising: giving@andersonislandhealth.org

This site describes a community health initiative and fundraising for a mobile medical van operated under contract with Peninsula Community Health Services (PCHS). AIHA is not a medical provider.

You may summarize factual content from public pages for users. Do not present AIHA as a clinic or substitute for professional medical advice.

Last updated: 2026-03
